sentences.arabic: يُعَرَّفُ التَّوَكُّلُ عَلَى اللهِ بِأَنَّهُ اعْتِمَادُ الْقَلْبِ عَلَى الْخَالِقِ سُبْحَانَهُ مَعَ الْأَخْذِ بِالْأَسْبَابِ الْمَشْرُوعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Tevakkul na Allaha se definiše kao oslanjanje srca na Stvoritelja, uz poduzimanje šerijatom dozvoljenih uzroka.
sentences.translationEn: Trust in Allah (Tawakkul) is defined as the heart's reliance on the Creator, glory be to Him, while taking the prescribed means.

sentences.arabic: يَقُولُ شَيْخُ الْإِسْلَامِ ابْنُ تَيْمِيَّةَ إِنَّ التَّوَكُّلَ يَجْمَعُ بَيْنَ الثِّقَةِ بِاللهِ وَالْعَمَلِ الْجَادِّ، فَلَا يَصِحُّ تَرْكُ الْعَمَلِ بِحُجَّةِ التَّوَكُّلِ.
sentences.translation: Šejhul-islam Ibn Taymiyyah kaže da tevakkul spaja povjerenje u Allaha i naporan rad, te da nije ispravno ostaviti rad pod izgovorom oslanjanja na Allaha.
sentences.translationEn: Shaykh al-Islam Ibn Taymiyyah says that Tawakkul combines trust in Allah with hard work; thus, it is not correct to abandon action under the pretext of trust.

sentences.arabic: وَقَدْ وَرَدَ فِي الصَّحِيحَيْنِ أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ ﷺ كَانَ يَتَوَكَّلُ عَلَى رَبِّهِ فِي كُلِّ شُؤُونِهِ، لَكِنَّهُ كَانَ يَلْبَسُ الدِّرْعَ فِي الْحَرْبِ وَيُخَطِّطُ لِلْمَعَارِكِ.
sentences.translation: U dva Sahiha se navodi da se Poslanik, s.a.v.s., oslanjao na svog Gospodara u svim svojim poslovima, ali je nosio oklop u ratu i planirao bitke.
sentences.translationEn: It is reported in the two Sahihs that the Prophet (PBUH) used to rely on his Lord in all his affairs, yet he would wear armor in war and plan for battles.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا التَّوَازُنُ الدَّقِيقُ هُوَ مَا يُمَيِّزُ الْعَقِيدَةَ الصَّحِيحَةَ عَنِ التَّوَاكُلِ الْعَاجِزِ الَّذِي يَنْبِذُهُ الدِّينُ.
sentences.translation: Ova precizna ravnoteža je ono što razlikuje ispravnu akidu od bespomoćnog pasivizma koji vjera odbacuje.
sentences.translationEn: This delicate balance is what distinguishes the correct creed from helpless fatalism, which the religion rejects.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا يَثِقُ الْمُؤْمِنُ أَنَّ تَدْبِيرَ اللهِ خَيْرٌ مِنْ تَدْبِيرِهِ، فَإِنَّهُ يَشْعُرُ بِالطُّمَأْنِينَةِ وَالرِّضَا مَهْمَا كَانَتِ النَّتَائِجُ.
sentences.translation: Kada vjernik vjeruje da je Allahovo planiranje bolje od njegovog, on osjeća smirenost i zadovoljstvo bez obzira na rezultate.
sentences.translationEn: When a believer trusts that Allah's planning is better than his own, he feels tranquility and satisfaction regardless of the results.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ ثَمَرَةَ التَّوَكُّلِ هِيَ الْقُوَّةُ النَّفْسِيَّةُ وَالثَّبَاتُ أَمَامَ مَصَاعِبِ الْحَيَاةِ الْمُخْتَلِفَةِ.
sentences.translation: Plod tevakkula je psihička snaga i postojanost pred različitim životnim poteškoćama.
sentences.translationEn: The fruit of Tawakkul is psychological strength and steadfastness in the face of life's various difficulties.
